repair_record.sql:
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT USER_PSEUDO_ID)
FROM GA4.GA4_OBFUSCATED_SAMPLE_ECOMMERCE.EVENTS_20201225
WHERE EVENT_NAME = 'user_engagement' AND EVENT_VALUE_IN_USD > 0
AND EVENT_TIMESTAMP BETWEEN TO_DATE('20210101', 'YYYYMMDD') AND TO_DATE('20210107', 'YYYYMMDD')
AND USER_PSEUDO_ID NOT IN (
    SELECT USER_PSEUDO_ID
    FROM GA4.GA4_OBFUSCATED_SAMPLE_ECOMMERCE.EVENTS_20201225
    WHERE EVENT_NAME = 'user_engagement' AND EVENT_VALUE_IN_USD > 0
    AND EVENT_TIMESTAMP BETWEEN TO_DATE('20210106', 'YYYYMMDD') AND TO_DATE('20210107', 'YYYYMMDD')
)

WITH CustomerPurchases AS (
  SELECT 
    fullVisitorId, 
    ARRAY(SELECT DISTINCT item.productSKU 
          FROM LATERAL FLATTEN(input => totals.transactions.items) AS t(item)) AS purchasedProducts 
  FROM 
    GA360.GOOGLE_ANALYTICS_SAMPLE.GA_SESSIONS_20160805 
  WHERE 
    DATE(date) BETWEEN '2017-07-01' AND '2017-07-31' 
    AND ARRAY_CONTAINS(CAST('Youtube Men’s Vintage Henley' AS VARIANT), 
                      ARRAY(SELECT DISTINCT item.productSKU 
                            FROM LATERAL FLATTEN(input => totals.transactions.items) AS t(item)))
),
TopSellingProduct AS (
  SELECT 
    EXCLUDE(purchasedProducts, CHARINDEX('Youtube Men’s Vintage Henley', CAST(purchasedProducts AS VARCHAR))) AS topSellingProduct 
  FROM 
    CustomerPurchases
)
SELECT 
  topSellingProduct 
FROM 
  TopSellingProduct 
WHERE 
  topSellingProduct IS NOT NULL

repair_record.sql:
WITH MonthlyRevenue AS (
    SELECT 
        trafficSource.adwordsClickInfo.criteriaParameters AS adwordCriteria,
        DATE_TRUNC('MONTH', TO_DATE(date, 'YYYYMMDD')) AS month,
        SUM(TRY_CAST(totals.transactionRevenue AS FLOAT)) AS totalRevenue
    FROM 
        GA360.GOOGLE_ANALYTICS_SAMPLE.GA_SESSIONS_20160916
    WHERE 
        date BETWEEN '20170101' AND '20171231'
    GROUP BY 
        trafficSource.adwordsClickInfo.criteriaParameters, 
        DATE_TRUNC('MONTH', TO_DATE(date, 'YYYYMMDD'))
)
SELECT 
    adwordCriteria,
    ROUND(MAX(totalRevenue), 2) - ROUND(MIN(totalRevenue), 2) AS revenueDifference
FROM 
    MonthlyRevenue
GROUP BY 
    adwordCriteria

WITH FirstVisit AS (
    SELECT 
        visitorId, 
        MIN(date) AS firstVisitDate
    FROM 
        GA360.GOOGLE_ANALYTICS_SAMPLE.GA_SESSIONS_201702
    GROUP BY 
        visitorId
),
FirstTransaction AS (
    SELECT 
        visitorId, 
        MIN(date) AS firstTransactionDate, 
        device.deviceCategory
    FROM 
        GA360.GOOGLE_ANALYTICS_SAMPLE.GA_SESSIONS_201702
    JOIN 
        LATERAL FLATTEN(input => hits) AS hit
    JOIN 
        LATERAL FLATTEN(input => TRY_CAST(hit.eCommerceAction.actionType AS VARCHAR)) AS action
    WHERE 
        action.value = '6' AND
        device.deviceCategory IS NOT NULL
    GROUP BY 
        visitorId, 
        device.deviceCategory
)
SELECT 
    fv.visitorId, 
    DATEDIFF(DAY, fv.firstVisitDate, ft.firstTransactionDate) AS daysElapsed,
    ft.deviceCategory
FROM 
    FirstVisit fv
JOIN 
    FirstTransaction ft ON fv.visitorId = ft.visitorId

WITH RevenueData AS (
    SELECT
        trafficSource.adwordsClickInfo.criteriaParameters AS adParams,
        SUM(TRY_CAST(totals.totalTransactionRevenue AS FLOAT)) / 1000000 AS totalRevenue,
        DATE_TRUNC('DAY', TO_DATE(date, 'YYYYMMDD')) AS day,
        DATE_TRUNC('WEEK', TO_DATE(date, 'YYYYMMDD')) AS week,
        DATE_TRUNC('MONTH', TO_DATE(date, 'YYYYMMDD')) AS month
    FROM
        GA360.GOOGLE_ANALYTICS_SAMPLE.GA_SESSIONS_20160822
    WHERE
        date BETWEEN '20160822' AND '20160915'
    GROUP BY
        adParams, day, week, month
)
SELECT
    adParams,
    MAX(totalRevenue) AS maxDailyRevenue,
    MAX(COALESCE(SUM(totalRevenue), 0)) OVER (PARTITION BY week ORDER BY week) AS maxWeeklyRevenue,
    MAX(COALESCE(SUM(totalRevenue), 0)) OVER (PARTITION BY month ORDER BY month) AS maxMonthlyRevenue
FROM
    RevenueData
ORDER BY
    maxDailyRevenue DESC
LIMIT 1

        ELSE 'non-purchase'

repair_record.sql:
SELECT 
    t.product_name, 
    SUM(t.quantity) AS total_quantity
FROM (
    SELECT 
        TRY_CAST(f.value:product_name AS VARCHAR) AS product_name,
        TRY_CAST(f.value:quantity AS INTEGER) AS quantity
    FROM 
        GA360.GOOGLE_ANALYTICS_SAMPLE.GA_SESSIONS_20160805 s,
        LATERAL FLATTEN(input => s.totals.items) f
    WHERE 
        s.date BETWEEN '20170701' AND '20170731'
        AND f.value:product_name ILIKE '%youtube%'
        AND f.value:product_name NOT ILIKE '%youtube%'
) t
GROUP BY 
    t.product_name
ORDER BY 
    total_quantity DESC
LIMIT 1

SELECT 
    h.exitScreenName AS NextPage,
    MAX(s.totals.timeOnSite) AS MaxTimeOnHomePage
FROM 
    GA360.GOOGLE_ANALYTICS_SAMPLE.GA_SESSIONS_20170101 AS s
JOIN 
    LATERAL FLATTEN(input => s.hits) AS h
WHERE 
    s.date BETWEEN '20170101' AND '20170131'
    AND s.channelGrouping ILIKE '%Data Share%'
    AND h.appInfo.exitScreenName LIKE '/home%'
GROUP BY 
    h.exitScreenName
ORDER BY 
    COUNT(*) DESC
LIMIT 1

SELECT 
    DATE_TRUNC('MONTH', TO_DATE(date, 'YYYYMMDD')) AS month,
    CASE WHEN SUM(COALESCE(totals->>'transactions', 0)) > 0 THEN 'purchase' ELSE 'non_purchase' END AS category,
    AVG(SUM(COALESCE(totals->>'pageviews', 0))) OVER (PARTITION BY DATE_TRUNC('MONTH', TO_DATE(date, 'YYYYMMDD')), category) AS avg_pageviews_per_visitor
FROM 
    GA360.GOOGLE_ANALYTICS_SAMPLE.GA_SESSIONS_20160806
WHERE 
    TO_DATE(date, 'YYYYMMDD') BETWEEN '20170601' AND '20170731'
GROUP BY 
    month, category
UNION ALL

repair_record.sql:
SELECT 
    visitorId, 
    MAX(DATEDIFF(DAY, MIN(visitStartTime), MAX(COALESCE(totals.transactionRevenue, visitStartTime)))) AS max_days_between_first_and_last_event
FROM 
    GA360.GOOGLE_ANALYTICS_SAMPLE.GA_SESSIONS_20160807
JOIN 
    LATERAL FLATTEN(input => hits) AS hit
LEFT JOIN 
    LATERAL FLATTEN(input => TRY_CAST(hit.eCommerceAction.action_type AS VARCHAR)) AS action ON TRUE
WHERE 
    device.mobileDevice = TRUE
GROUP BY 
    visitorId
